title: September 26
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 26''' is the 269th day of the year (270th in leap years). There are 96 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[Gerald W. Abrams]] is born.
*[[1940s#1941|1941]] – [[Tom Veitch]] is born.
*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Louise Simonson]] is born.
*1946 – [[Togo Igawa]] is born.
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[Craig Chaquico]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Roger MacBride Allen]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 18|''Star Wars'' (1977) 18]] published. The cover date is December.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 83|''Star Wars Weekly'' 83]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[Droids (1995) 5|''Droids'' (1995) 5]] published.
*1995 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 3|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 3]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars: The Bounty Hunters (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: The Bounty Hunters'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 34|''Star Wars'' (1998) 34]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Jedi]], [[The Force]], and [[Dark side of the Force|the Dark Side]] are added to the Oxford English Dictionary.<noinclude><ref>Greater London ''Evening Standard'' [https://www.newspapers.com/clip/86007190/added-to-oxford-dictionary-jedi-the "New Oxford Dictionary pays respect to street language"] by Martin Delgado, September 26, 2002</ref></noinclude>
*[[2003]] – [[Star Wars Insider 71|''Star Wars Insider'' 71]] released for subscribers.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars Insider 84|''Star Wars Insider'' 84]] published.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – [[Darth Maul — Death Sentence 3|''Darth Maul—Death Sentence'' 3]] published.
*2012 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Out]]'' airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – ''[[Viva Space Vegas! The History of the Marvelous Wheel]] Part 1'' published online.
*[[2017]] – ''[[The Prequel Trilogy Stories]]'' published.
*2017 – ''[[3 Out-of-This-World Tales!]]'' published.
*2017 – [[Barry Dennen]] dies.
*2017 – ''[[Sutā Wōzu No Buki 100]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Poe Dameron 31|''Poe Dameron'' 31]] published.
*2018 – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 24|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 24]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 14|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 14]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge – Adventure Awaits|''Star Wars'': Galaxy's Edge – ''Adventure Awaits'']] airs on [[Freeform]].
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 6: Quests of the Force]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures Volume 1 (Phase II)]]'' published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic: Tempest Runner (script)|''The High Republic: Tempest Runner'' script]] reprinted in paperback.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars Insider 221]]'' published.
*2023 – "[[Part Seven: Dreams and Madness]]" airs on Disney+.
*[[2025]] – "[[Helping Chewbacca Save The Millennium Falcon!]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
<noinclude>
